food_pairing.name: Rioja Gran Reserva with chuleton
food_pairing.pairing: Aged Rioja Gran Reserva with char-grilled chuleton de buey
food_pairing.description: The Basque country's great aged-beef chop, seared over embers, meets the resolved tannins and savoury oak of a long-aged Rioja Gran Reserva.

food_pairing.name: Rioja Reserva with roast lamb
food_pairing.pairing: Classic Rioja Reserva with cordero asado al sarmiento
food_pairing.description: Vine-shoot-roasted suckling lamb is the canonical Rioja match; the sweet fat is framed by the wine's fine tannin and dried-cherry savour.

food_pairing.name: Barrel-aged white Rioja with bacalao al pil pil
food_pairing.pairing: Oxidative barrel-aged white Rioja with bacalao al pil pil
food_pairing.description: Salt cod in its emulsified garlic-oil sauce finds its peer in the waxy, nutty, saline texture of an oak-aged white Rioja.

food_pairing.name: Rioja rosado with the Gilda pintxo
food_pairing.pairing: Barrel-aged Rioja rosado with the Gilda anchovy-olive-guindilla pintxo
food_pairing.description: San Sebastian's original pintxo, all salt, acid and chilli, sharpens the saline citrus of a serious gastronomic Rioja rosado.

food_pairing.name: White Rioja with kokotxas de merluza
food_pairing.pairing: Aged white Rioja with kokotxas de merluza al pil pil
food_pairing.description: Gelatinous hake cheeks in pil pil echo the rich, nutty depth of a barrel-aged white Rioja while its acidity keeps the dish lifted.

food_pairing.name: Varietal Graciano with game
food_pairing.pairing: Varietal Rioja Graciano with roast game and venison
food_pairing.description: Dark, peppery, high-acid Graciano stands up to the gaminess of venison and wild bird where many Tempranillos would fade.

food_pairing.name: Modern Rioja with author pintxos
food_pairing.pairing: Fruit-forward modern Rioja with pintxos de autor
food_pairing.description: A varied crawl of creative pintxos calls for a bright, supple, fruit-forward modern Rioja that flatters everything from croquetas to grilled prawns.

food_pairing.name: Icon Rioja with venison loin
food_pairing.pairing: Modern icon Rioja with roast venison loin
food_pairing.description: The most concentrated modern Riojas, with their cassis-and-graphite density and velvet tannin, meet the richness of roast venison.

food_pairing.name: Monopole-style white with fresh anchovy
food_pairing.pairing: Saline white Rioja with marinated anchoa fresca
food_pairing.description: Cantabrian marinated anchovy and a saline, manzanilla-edged or racy white Rioja are a coastal natural, salt meeting citrus and mineral.

food_pairing.name: Off-dry white Rioja with Basque cheesecake
food_pairing.pairing: Off-dry white Rioja with tarta de queso vasca
food_pairing.description: The burnt-top Basque cheesecake's caramelised sweetness is echoed by a gently off-dry, floral white Rioja for an easy regional dessert match.
